backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point for the Internet Computer canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting testing requirements for core application functionality including onboarding, quests, streaks, skills, boss challenges, and achievements with localStorage persistence on mainnet.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files including types, utilities, hooks, contexts, components, and pages for the RPG self-improvement application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including RPG-themed color schemes and sidebar styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React application with a root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component managing tab navigation, onboarding flow, level-up modals, achievement notifications, and rendering different page views with RPG-themed layout and background.
frontend/src/components/AchievementBadge: Component displaying achievement badges with icons, titles, descriptions, locked/unlocked states, and glowing effects for unlocked achievements.
frontend/src/components/AchievementNotif: Toast notification component that displays achievement unlock notifications using sonner library when new achievements are earned.
frontend/src/components/BossChallengeCar: Card component for boss challenges showing title, description, XP reward, deadline countdown, completion status, and action buttons for edit/delete/complete.
frontend/src/components/BossChallengeFor: Dialog form for creating and editing boss challenges with fields for title, description, XP reward, frequency, deadline date picker, and reward title.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: Modal dialog that displays a rank-up celebration with animated badge, rank name, XP threshold, and a close button. Opens when rankId is provided and shows the corresponding rank from RANKS data.
frontend/src/components/ProgressBar.tsx: Reusable progress bar component with optional label and numeric display. Features animated gradient fill with glow effects and calculates percentage from current/max values.
frontend/src/components/ProgressTimeline: Displays a vertical timeline of user milestones (rank, achievement, streak, skill, boss) with type-specific icons and colors. Shows empty state when no milestones exist.
frontend/src/components/QuestCard.tsx: Card component for displaying individual quests with checkbox, title, description, XP reward with streak multiplier, category/frequency badges, and edit/delete buttons on hover. Supports completed state styling.
frontend/src/components/QuestForm.tsx: Dialog form for creating or editing quests with fields for title, description, XP reward, category, and frequency. Pre-populates fields when editing an existing quest.
frontend/src/components/RankDisplay.tsx: Displays current rank with badge image, total XP, and progress bar to next rank. Supports compact mode and shows special message when max rank is achieved.
frontend/src/components/SkillTree.tsx: Card component showing individual skill progress with icon, level, total XP, progress bar to next level, and visual level indicators (10 dots). Features hover effects and skill-specific color gradients.
Grid panel displaying six key statistics: quests completed, current/longest streak, bosses defeated, days active, and total XP. Each stat has an icon and color-coded styling.
frontend/src/components/StreakDisplay.ts: Card showing current streak days with flame icon, XP multiplier, and longest streak. Icon color and glow effects change based on streak length (7/14/30+ days).
frontend/src/components/TabNavigation.ts: React component that renders a navigation bar with five tabs (Dashboard, Skills, Quests, Profile, Leaderboard) using lucide-react icons and highlighting the active tab with gold styling.
frontend/src/contexts/AppContext.tsx: Main application context provider that manages user progress state including quests, boss challenges, skills, achievements, streaks, and milestones with localStorage persistence. Provides CRUD operations for quests and boss challenges, handles XP/rank calculations, streak tracking, achievement checking, and onboarding flow.
frontend/src/data/achievements.ts: Defines initial achievement data with 8 achievements including first quest completion, streak milestones (7-day, 30-day), skill levels, boss challenges, and rank progression with associated icons and unlock criteria.
frontend/src/data/questTemplates.ts: Provides quest templates organized by goal category (Fitness, Mental Health, etc.) and difficulty level (easy, balanced, hard) with predefined titles, descriptions, XP rewards, and skill categories.
frontend/src/data/ranks.ts: Defines 10 progression ranks from Novice (0 XP) to Transcendent (5500 XP) with associated badge images and XP thresholds.
frontend/src/data/skills.ts: Defines five skill categories (Fitness, Mind, Social, Finance, Creativity) with metadata including names, descriptions, icons, and gradient colors, plus a function to calculate XP required for each level using exponential scaling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, automatically invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Custom React hook that provides a useState-like interface for persisting and retrieving JSON-serializable values in browser localStorage with error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom RPG-themed color variables (dark purples, golds) using OKLCH color space, custom utility classes for RPG styling, and imports for Cinzel and Inter fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying user's character name, rank, streak, and today's incomplete daily quests with ability to complete, edit, or delete them.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Progress history page showing total milestones, current rank, achievements count, and a timeline of user milestones.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingSurvey.tsx: Multi-step onboarding survey (6 steps) collecting character name, goal categories, activity level, mental wellness, preferred time, and difficulty mode, then generates personalized quests based on responses.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Character profile page displaying rank, skill levels with XP for each category, statistics panel, and achievement badges.
frontend/src/pages/Quests.tsx: Quest management page with tabs for daily quests and boss challenges, allowing users to create, edit, delete, and complete both quest types with separate active and completed sections.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Skills page displaying a grid of skill trees for each skill category, showing progression through quest completion.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the entire app including Quest, BossChallenge, SkillProgress, Achievement, StreakData, OnboardingData, UserProgress, and related enums.
frontend/src/utils/achievementChecker.ts: Utility function that checks user progress against achievement criteria (quest completion, streaks, skill levels, boss challenges) and returns newly unlocked achievements.
frontend/src/utils/questGenerator.ts: Generates 6-10 personalized daily quests based on onboarding data (goals, difficulty, activity level, mental wellness) by selecting and shuffling templates from questTemplates, adjusting intensity for lower activity/wellness levels.
frontend/src/utils/rankCalculator.ts: Calculates current rank from XP, retrieves next rank, and computes progress percentage toward the next rank threshold using the RANKS data array.
frontend/src/utils/skillCalculator.ts: Calculates skill levels from XP, determines XP required for next level, computes progress percentage, and initializes skill progress objects for all skill categories.
frontend/src/utils/streakCalculator.ts: Manages streak logic including multiplier calculation (1x to 3x based on streak length), streak break detection (>1 day gap), and streak increment validation based on last completion date.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette using OKLCH color space (including RPG-themed colors), border radius variables, glow shadows, and animation keyframes for accordion and other UI elements.
project_state.json: Project metadata documenting the Self-Improvement RPG app architecture, features (rank progression, quests, streaks, skills, boss challenges, achievements, onboarding), and technical stack (React, Tailwind, localStorage).
